parameters.description: Node type to be filtered out.

parameters.description: Return only services filtered by service type.

parameters.description: Return only services in this external group.

delete.description: Removes a Service along with its Agents.

parameters.name: service_id
parameters.description: Either a Service ID or a Service Name.

post.description: Discovers Azure Database for MySQL, MariaDB and PostgreSQL Server instances.

UniversalNodeService.description: Service represents a service running on a node.

hr.description: High resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

mr.description: Medium resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

lr.description: Low resolution. In JSON should be represented as a string with number of seconds with `s` suffix.

commonMetricsResolutions.description: MetricsResolutions represents Prometheus exporters metrics resolutions.

tags.description: Tags are used to filter annotations.

Tablestats group collectors will be disabled if there are more than that number of tables.
If zero, server's default value is used.
Use negative value to disable them.

runs_on_node_id.description:
Node identifier on which an external exporter is been running.
runs_on_node_id should always be passed with node_id.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: node_id, node_name, add_node.

node_name.description:
Node name on which a service and node is been running.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: node_id, node_name, add_node.

add_node.description:
Create a new Node with those parameters.
add_node should always be passed with address.
Exactly one of these parameters should be present: node_id, node_name, add_node.

address.description:
Node and Exporter access address (DNS name or IP).
address should always be passed with add_node.

service_name.description: Unique across all Services user-defined name. Required.

username.description: HTTP basic auth username for collecting metrics.

password.description: HTTP basic auth password for collecting metrics.

scheme.description: Scheme to generate URI to exporter metrics endpoints.

metrics_path.description: Path under which metrics are exposed, used to generate URI.

node_id.description:
Node identifier on which an external service is been running.
node_id should always be passed with runs_on_node_id.

metrics_mode.description:
Defines metrics flow model for this exporter.
Metrics could be pushed to the server with vmagent,
pulled by the server, or the server could choose behavior automatically.
Node with registered pmm_agent_id must present at pmm-server
in case of push metrics_mode.

v1AgentStatus.description:
AgentStatus represents actual Agent status.

 - AGENT_STATUS_STARTING: Agent is starting.
 - AGENT_STATUS_INITIALIZATION_ERROR: Agent encountered error when starting.
 - AGENT_STATUS_RUNNING: Agent is running.
 - AGENT_STATUS_WAITING: Agent encountered error and will be restarted automatically soon.
 - AGENT_STATUS_STOPPING: Agent is stopping.
 - AGENT_STATUS_DONE: Agent has been stopped or disabled.
 - AGENT_STATUS_UNKNOWN: Agent is not connected, we don't know anything about it's state.

push_metrics_enabled.description: True if exporter uses push metrics mode.

v1RDSExporter.description: RDSExporter runs on Generic or Container Node and exposes RemoteRDS Node metrics.

pmm_agent_id.description: The pmm-agent identifier which runs this instance.

disabled.description: Desired Agent status: enabled (false) or disabled (true).

username.description: MongoDB username for getting profiler data.

tls_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate and hostname validation.

v1RTAMongoDBAgent.description: RTAMongoDBAgent runs within pmm-agent and sends MongoDB Real-Time Query Analytics data to the PMM Server.

collect_interval.description: Query collect interval (default 2s is set by server).

v1RTAOptions.description: RTAOptions holds Real-Time Query Analytics agent options.

pmm_agent_id.description: The pmm-agent identifier which runs this instance.

disabled.description: Desired Agent status: enabled (false) or disabled (true).

username.description: PostgreSQL username for getting session data.

tls_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate and hostname validation.

v1RTAPostgreSQLAgent.description: RTAPostgreSQLAgent runs within pmm-agent and sends PostgreSQL Real-Time Query Analytics data to the PMM Server.

node_name.description: A user-defined name unique across all Nodes.

address.description: Node address (DNS name or IP).

container_id.description: Container identifier. If specified, must be a unique Docker container identifier.

reregister.description: If true, and Node with that name already exist, it will be removed with all dependent Services and Agents.

metrics_mode.description:
Defines metrics flow model for node_exporter being added by this request.
Metrics could be pushed to the server with vmagent,
pulled by the server, or the server could choose behavior automatically.

disable_collectors.description: List of collector names to disable in this exporter.

expose_exporter.title: Optionally expose the exporter process on all public interfaces

token.description: Token represents token for vmagent auth config.

node_id.description: Unique randomly generated instance identifier.

node_name.description: Unique across all Nodes user-defined name.

address.description: DB instance identifier.

v1RemoteRDSNode.description: RemoteRDSNode represents remote RDS Node. Agents can't run on Remote RDS Nodes.

is_agent_password_set.description: True if the agent password is set.

is_aws_secret_key_set.description: True if AWS Secret Key is set.

azure_options.description: Options used for connecting to Azure.

disabled.description: Desired Agent status: enabled (false) or disabled (true).

max_query_log_size.description: Limit query log size in QAN.

metrics_path.description: Path under which metrics are exposed, used to generate URI.

metrics_scheme.description: Scheme to generate URI to exporter metrics endpoints.

mongo_db_options.description: TLS and other options for connecting to MongoDB.

mysql_options.description: TLS and other options for connecting to MySQL.

node_id.description: A unique node identifier.

is_password_set.description: True if password for connecting the agent to the database is set.

pmm_agent_id.description: The pmm-agent identifier.

postgresql_options.description: TLS options for connecting to PostgreSQL.

push_metrics.description: True if exporter uses push metrics mode.

query_examples_disabled.description: True if query examples are disabled.

comments_parsing_disabled.description: True if query comments parsing is disabled.

rds_basic_metrics_disabled.description: True if RDS basic metrics are disdabled.

rds_enhanced_metrics_disabled.description: True if RDS enhanced metrics are disdabled.

runs_on_node_id.description: Node identifier where this instance runs.

table_count_tablestats_group_limit.description:
Tablestats group collectors are disabled if there are more than that number of tables.
0 means tablestats group collectors are always enabled (no limit).
Negative value means tablestats group collectors are always disabled.

tls_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate and hostname validation.

username.description: HTTP basic auth username for collecting metrics.

is_connected.description: True if Agent is running and connected to pmm-managed.

expose_exporter.description: True if an exporter agent is exposed on all host addresses.

node_id.description: Unique Node identifier.

container_id.description: A node's unique docker container identifier.

address.description: Node address (DNS name or IP).

status.description: The health status of the node.

agents.description: List of agents related to this node.

services.description: List of services running on this node.

instance_id.description: Instance ID for cloud providers (e.g. AWS RDS).

is_pmm_server_node.description: True if this node is a PMM Server node (HA mode).

v1UniversalNodeStatus.description:
Node status.

 - STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Invalid status.
 - STATUS_UP: The node is up.
 - STATUS_DOWN: The node is down.
 - STATUS_UNKNOWN: The node's status cannot be known (e.g. there are no metrics yet).

service_name.description: User-defined name unique across all Services.

node_id.description: Node identifier where this instance runs.

node_name.description: Node name where this instance runs.

address.description:
Access address (DNS name or IP).
Address (and port) or socket is required.

port.description:
Access port.
Port is required when the address present.

socket.description:
Access unix socket.
Address (and port) or socket is required.

agents.description: List of agents related to this service.

status.description: The health status of the service.

v1UniversalServiceStatus.description:
Service status.

 - STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: In case we don't support the db vendor yet.
 - STATUS_UP: The service is up.
 - STATUS_DOWN: The service is down.
 - STATUS_UNKNOWN: The service's status cannot be known (e.g. there are no metrics yet).

warning.description: Warning message if there are more service tokens attached to service account.

v1UpdateSeverity.description:
- UPDATE_SEVERITY_UNSUPPORTED: The client version is newer than the server version.
 - UPDATE_SEVERITY_UP_TO_DATE: The client version matches the server version.
 - UPDATE_SEVERITY_REQUIRED: The client's minor or patch version is older.
 - UPDATE_SEVERITY_CRITICAL: The client's major version is older.

pmm_agent_id.description: The pmm-agent identifier which runs this instance.

disabled.description: Desired Agent status: enabled (false) or disabled (true).

username.description: Valkey username for scraping metrics.

tls_skip_verify.description: Skip TLS certificate and hostname verification.

push_metrics_enabled.description: True if exporter uses push metrics mode.

expose_exporter.title: Optionally expose the exporter process on all public interfaces

v1ValkeyExporter.description: ValkeyExporter runs on Generic or Container Node and exposes Valkey Service metrics.

service_name.description: Unique across all Services user-defined name.

node_id.description: Node identifier where this instance runs.

address.description:
Access address (DNS name or IP).
Address (and port) or socket is required.

port.description:
Access port.
Port is required when the address present.

socket.description:
Access unix socket.
Address (and port) or socket is required.

v1ValkeyService.description: ValkeyService represents a generic Valkey instance.
